spoilers.title: Today marks two years since Akira Toriyama, creator of #DragonBall, passed. His home is near my hometown. When his family asked fans not to bring flowers or visit, no one showed up. That showed how de
spoilers.text: Today marks two years since Akira Toriyama, creator of #DragonBall, passed. His home is near my hometown. When his family asked fans not to bring flowers or visit, no one showed up. That showed how deeply he was loved and respected. I hope he’s still drawing freely in heaven.🙏

spoilers.text: Boruto fans from 2017 to January 2026:“Boruto fandom needs a leaker. We want to have a leaker who can leak 6-7 panels and create a massive hype for the next new Boruto chapters!!“ Boruto fans since a random day on February 2026:“ All leakers should die!🤬“ Y‘all are so funny #BORUTO

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 Let's assume God of War is from the first world. And if we follow the theory that there were no Devil Fruits in the first world, how could someone transform into a dragon without a Devil Fruit?

misc.title: Throwback to when Martin Luther King Jr held the first ever copy of Boruto TBV in his hands. “Boruto isn’t only a great story for showing political power in the world but also how a world without raci
misc.text: Throwback to when Martin Luther King Jr held the first ever copy of Boruto TBV in his hands. “Boruto isn’t only a great story for showing political power in the world but also how a world without racism can move people’s life. Read Boruto!” - Martin Luther King Jr (1965) #BORUTO

misc.title: Can somebody explain this in Naruto/Boruto terms? #BORUTO #NARUTO (@) BREAKING: Israeli PM Netanyahu is facing critical health condition, he has blood cancer , diagnosed yesterday. Community note: No
misc.text: Can somebody explain this in Naruto/Boruto terms? #BORUTO #NARUTO (@) BREAKING: Israeli PM Netanyahu is facing critical health condition, he has blood cancer , diagnosed yesterday. Community note: No evidence confirms Israeli PM Netanyahu has blood cancer; his February 2025 medical report states he is cancer-free with normal blood tests. jpost.com/health-and-wel… tps.co.il/articles/netan… — https://nitter.net/i/status/2023586079522386363#m

items.text: Today marks two years since Akira Toriyama, creator of #DragonBall, passed. His home is near my hometown. When his family asked fans not to bring flowers or visit, no one showed up. That showed how deeply he was loved and respected. I hope he’s still drawing freely in heaven.🙏
